abilities.name: 텔레파시
abilities.description: 같은 편의 공격의 낌새를 읽고 기술을 받지 않는다.

flavorTexts.text: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.
An infant sleeps inside the ball. Rabsca rolls the ball soothingly with its legs to ensure the infant sleeps comfortably.
